{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201512226BBF12095E049E7C2097"}"},"total":6115},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7365529457363780414","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还有就是里面也有很多感人的情节[哭]，大部分故事发展在意料之外，又在情理之中，不按传统套路出牌，很有意思[酷]
还有很燃的场面描写[赶稿中]，也有又大又多又强的科技震撼[怒]，还有我可爱动人的望舒[飞吻]，爱看，大力支持[求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714923567,"group_id":"7129535318499265543","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101312301061"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7129535318499265543","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"270"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":39423,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":77777,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7365530813030040382","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豪看👀，前期感觉就是正常的穿越爽文，后面世界观一展开，越看越上头了
作者人物刻画很鲜明生动，中间的故事情节很有趣，也适当穿插了很多梗，成分很复杂，但是又不相冲突，越读越好看，为作者大大点赞，加油继续写下去[探究]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714923312,"group_id":"7129535318499265543","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N97dWFDKU07ZILTqU1usyMY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5d3097ad11744a48af04945ef0050d87~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537939&x-signature=PizbosIV%2FKuV8Di%2Bfz7s4j8rkFY%3D","user_id":"101312301061","user_name":"唯共与君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101312301061","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7129535318499265543","book_info":{"abstract":"【火力平推】【科技无敌】【单女主】【不降智】
当一名年轻的舰长，带着一艘纵横星海的羲和战舰，穿越到这片玄幻的世界。
任你飞天遁地，掌灭山河，傲慢的修仙者们，也要低头叩拜这名为“科学”的神迹。
裂空炮、二向箔、光粒打击、黑洞轰炸……
机械金丹，电子元婴，机甲化神，星舰集群……
吾赵长安，唯有一舰，可焚城，煮海，弑神，歼星！
羲和横天八万里，一舰光寒十四州！
舰来！
【本书无科幻标签，科幻部分均为架空幻想，与现实理论无任何联系。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0999bce65fbb190ddc5d53fa9b481247","author":"南风等故人","author_id":"","book_id":"7129535318499265543","book_name":"星际战舰：我在玄幻火力覆盖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7129536076691178018","read_count":"43915","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2582641"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"962","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/de6876a354ba52517b91ba86b989e63d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779174742&x-signature=ZLeWIMJs3wtiB5HuE7u58rPkh54%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1460619243160599","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"270"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201512226BBF12095E049E7C2097"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":39423,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":77777,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":21239},"user_action":{"aut or":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7344672513322009369","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"“有烟无伤定律虽然大部分时间奏效，但当您持有云爆弹，温压弹，战术核弹等武器时，该定律作废。”
         联邦羲和的设定真的绝了，灭绝令也很吸睛。科技碾压的恒星级星舰羲和号迁越到灵气世界当“舰修”用科技与狠活改变了整个时代。我靠忎，啥时候我们也能有羲和般的科技实力。
        作者更新比较慢，但是质量有保证，从元素系列高位灭绝以及十日煌等等灭绝令的设定都是有认真钻研的。不同于隔壁王自律，在科技线不崩塌的同时，人物形象的塑造也一点都不差。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710067419,"group_id":"7129535318499265543","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"（鱼）ԅ～(￣▽￣～)~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7otv/6MeIwjxW8qky+INtE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/18fe2a689cdc49799ca59f15ef198e9f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536917&x-signature=9P2DmkuoYfFNV%2FfZnnmDzbHfVtI%3D","user_id":"18601500138","user_name":"二三八"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"18601500138","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1712658640,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7129535318499265543","book_info":{"abstract":"【火力平推】【科技无敌】【单女主】【不降智】
